name: Seed URL Builder
description: Generate candidate URLs from known high-value paths (/about, /press, /careers, etc.) and validate they exist via HEAD requests.
usage_notes: Run early in Step 1 to seed the URL pool with common high-value pages. Complements sitemap-parser and page-links -- catches important pages that may not appear in sitemaps or navigation.

options.name: max_concurrent
options.label: Max concurrent requests
options.description: How many paths to check in parallel per entity.

options.name: request_timeout
options.label: Request timeout (ms)
options.description: Maximum time to wait for each URL check.

options.name: custom_paths
options.label: Custom paths
options.description: Additional paths to check, one per line (e.g. /regulierung or /partenaires). Added to the default list.

options.name: include_redirects
options.label: Include redirect targets
options.description: Follow redirects and capture the final URL. If disabled, only direct 200 responses are kept.
